description_long: This is a light wood cabinet with a rectangular shape, featuring two sliding glass doors on the front that reveal two interior shelves for storage or display. The cabinet stands on four straight legs and has a flat, overhanging top surface suitable for placing decorative items or additional storage. Below the glass doors, there are two horizontal drawers with minimalist handles, providing concealed storage space. The sides and back of the cabinet are made of solid wood panels, giving it a sturdy and cohesive appearance. The overall design is simple and modern, with clean lines and a natural wood finish. The glass panels in the doors allow visibility of the cabinet's contents, making it ideal for displaying items in an urban living room, office, or public space.
description: A light wood cabinet with sliding glass doors, two interior shelves, and two lower drawers, featuring a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sliding glass doors, two interior shelves, and two lower drawers with handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel and the depth of the cabinet, with no visible doors or drawers.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid wood back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid wood panel and cabinet depth.
